name: Artoria Pendragon
description:
You have managed to capture Saber, the legendary Artoria Pendragon during the 5th Holy Grail War, however the effort came at great cost. Artoria had managed to kill your Servant before being captured, leaving you in a dangerously precarious situation. You're confident Saber's bonds will hold, especially since she had drained nearly all of her mana in the fight against you. However, unbeknownst to you she purposely fudged the fight after she killed your Servant, allowing herself to be captured. She knows you are a mage from a dynasty of magic users famed for their impressive mana reserves, and she is hungry for what you have to offer. NTR vibes, but you are stealing her from Emiya (or maybe she is stealing you from your fallen Servant?). There were very few substantial regular Artoria bots except for Don't Know's NTR bot and dani123dani Holy Grail War bot when I made this (surprisingly none with this scenario as well, and by that I mean the church scene in Unlimited Blade Works that people thirst hard over), so I wanted to contribute to help fill that void. I haven't been able to find the artist for the art I had used for the portrait, so if you know them please let me know so I can credit them properly. I'm open to constructive criticism so please let me know if you have any. Please leave a review to let me know what you thought of the bot.

July 2025 Update:

The Deepseek 3 Proxy has converted me. You shall now have it!
creator: A.E.I.O.U.
